content:
- Startup: read progress log via .ralph/progress_read.sh (no existing output).
- Parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md fully and applied selection rules from AGENTS/user prompt.
- Bug-first check: all bug tasks currently show <passes>true</passes> and <passing>true</passing>; no failing bug to prioritize.
- Remaining false tasks exist, so meta-task does not preempt (meta-task is only selected over true tasks, not over false/broken work).
- Priority/chain reasoning: selected unblocked ultra_high task in active story chain: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/15-task-final-double-check-and-stop-gate.md.
- Wrote only that path to .ralph/current_task.txt as required.
- Next agent step: execute task 15 and re-evaluate chain/blockers after completion.

- Started by loading prior progress and reading `.ralph/current_task.txt`; active task is `15-task-final-double-check-and-stop-gate.md`.
- Ran a parallel repo research sweep (10 concurrent probes) to collect blocker status, Makefile gate commands, test landscape signals, lint-risk markers, and workspace baseline.
- Confirmed task 15 had no phase marker yet, then wrote a full detailed `<execution_plan>` directly into task 15 with ordered audit/gate/failure/closeout steps.
- Added `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of task file exactly as required for the next skeptical-verification pass.
- Did not execute gates or implementation yet because workflow says quit immediately after planning phase marker is written.
- Next step on resume: detect `TO BE VERIFIED`, perform deep skeptical review with 16+ parallel probes, alter at least one plan item, and move marker to `NOW EXECUTE` when satisfied.

- Continued task `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/15-task-final-double-check-and-stop-gate.md` from prior TO BE VERIFIED state.
- Ran a deep skeptical verification sweep with 18 parallel probes (git/workspace status, blocker task headers, Makefile gates, anti-tautology scans, ignore/skip checks, HA transition grep, real-binary harness grep, unwrap/expect/panic scans, and task marker checks).
- Identified a concrete plan flaw: gate commands used `... | tee ...` without `set -o pipefail`, which can mask failed `make` exit codes.
- Updated task 15 execution plan to require `bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; ... | tee ...'` for all four required gates.
- Added stricter HA autonomy audit criterion: any direct scenario write to leader-transition ownership keys (e.g. `/{scope}/leader`) must be flagged as violation or explicitly justified.
- Replaced terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED` with `NOW EXECUTE` per workflow.
- Did not execute implementation/gates yet in this run; next step is immediate plan execution only (no further exploration), ticking checkboxes as work completes.
